query: Write a Python CLI using splunklib to run a saved search and export results to CSV.
Help me choose between Dashboard Studio and Simple XML for a new Splunk dashboard, and explain the tradeoffs.
Build a Splunk technical add-on with UCC, modular inputs, and an OAuth-backed account page.
Design an MCP server that exposes safe, read-only Splunk search tools to an LLM.
Use Ansible to upgrade a distributed Splunk deployment and roll out updated apps safely.
Write an SPL2 module with custom functions and types to validate and transform log data.
Help me convert this SPL search to SPL2 using the from command with SQL syntax.
Create an Edge Processor pipeline in SPL2 that masks PII fields before indexing.
Write Python automation to import ITSI services and entities from a saved search and keep the import recurring.
Help me define ITSI notable event aggregation policies for Episode Review, including filtering and split-by fields.
Show the concrete settings and config files needed for a custom ITSI role to edit deep dives and glass tables.
Create a Word document memo with a title page and a table of contents.
Build a React landing page for a coffee shop and make it look premium.
Scrape a website for product prices and save them to CSV.
